raw.message: Get a Welcome Bonus of 2M FREE Chips!

hook.summary: Rob Riggle aggressively challenges the viewer to crush their opponents.
hook.visual_action: Rob Riggle in a maroon suit points and gestures intensely at the camera.
hook.voiceover_transcript: Crush your opponents' dreams with Zynga Poker's new multi-table tournaments.

scene_flow: Rob Riggle delivers an aggressive call to action in a formal suit.
Cinematic transition to a neon-lit poker stadium environment.
Gameplay footage showing a multi-table tournament win with exploding chips.
Rob Riggle celebrates on a mountain top as chips rain down.
Final CTA screen with 'Play Now' button and app store icons.
audience_proxy: Competitive adult males 25-50 who enjoy high-stakes poker and sports-like presentation.
